query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, d.nome as departamento, l.name as lider FROM users u LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Julia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dinica%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.departamentoId, u.leaderId, d.nome as departamento, l.name as lider FROM users u LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id LEFT JOIN users l ON u.leaderId = l.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Julia%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dinica%';
